title: Questions to some forum members
wikitext:
[]: Questions to some forum members             Quote Post by Waffle Wars » Sat Apr 15, 2023 7:56 pm I've been mostly a lurker here for the past two years and, after reading so many threads, I have a few questions to ask some of you guys... - Blockio: are you into EVA for the same reasons you like Gundam? Are they remotely alike? I'm thinking of watching Gundam someday. - Kendrix: do you really like Rei's ending in Girlfriend of Steel 2 or is it a joke? - BernardoCairo: Evangelion or Dragon Ball? - Axx°N N: Would you rather sit through 24 hours of Rebuild content or starve for three days? - JoelcrNeto: where do you find so many cool images? - C.T.1290: what's up with you and Asuka? - ElMariachi: did 3.0 + 1.0 grown on you over time? It seems like you haven't been as bothered by it lately. - kuribo-04 the unanswered question... Are you from Spain or Germany? - Mr. Tines: have you tried getting your family to watch Evangelion with you? - FreakyFilmFan4ever: favorite Kubrick movie? - Gendo'sPapa: did you miss checking 3.0 + 1.0's box office when it went out of theaters? It almost felt like a weekly ritual you did back then. - FelipeFritschF: was the wiki something that brought you inner satisfaction at the time? Is that why you put so much effort into it? - Szmitten: have you considered writing a book about the production history of Evangelion? - AWinters: Did you complete your project?

[]: Re: Questions to some forum members             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Apr 15, 2023 8:53 pm Waffle Wars wrote: Blockio: are you into EVA for the same reasons you like Gundam? Are they remotely alike? I'm thinking of watching Gundam someday.

[]: Re: Questions to some forum members             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 16, 2023 3:21 am Waffle Wars wrote: Mr. Tines: have you tried getting your family to watch Evangelion with you?

[]: Re: Questions to some forum members             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Apr 16, 2023 12:57 pm Waffle Wars wrote: kuribo-04 the unanswered question... Are you from Spain or Germany?
